name: CrewAI Enterprise MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official CrewAI Enterprise MCP server enabling AI agents to deploy and interact with CrewAI's enterprise multi-agent orchestration platform — managing crews, agents, and tasks; kicking off multi-agent workflows; retrieving execution results; and integrating CrewAI's collaborative agent framework into other MCP-based agent workflows.
use_cases: Triggering CrewAI crew executions from orchestrating AI agents
Managing agent crews and task definitions from platform engineering agents
Retrieving workflow execution results from monitoring agents
Composing CrewAI with other MCP tools for complex orchestration patterns
Deploying and managing enterprise AI agent workflows from ops agents
Integrating CrewAI crews into larger agent pipelines
not_for: Teams using LangChain agents, AutoGen, or other multi-agent frameworks exclusively
Simple single-agent workflows (CrewAI adds orchestration overhead)
best_when: An agent needs to trigger or manage CrewAI multi-agent workflows — especially for complex tasks requiring collaborative agent crews.
avoid_when: You're using LangChain, AutoGen, or another agent framework — or if you need simple single-agent workflows.

auth.notes: CrewAI Enterprise API key for platform access. Key provides access to all Enterprise features within the account. No scope granularity.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Open source CrewAI: free; Enterprise platform: paid
pricing.notes: CrewAI open source framework is free (pip install). Enterprise platform adds deployment, monitoring, and management. MCP server is open source official.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise tier dependent; no public rate limit documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise platform separate from open source CrewAI — requires separate account
Crew execution is async — agents must poll for completion status
Crew and agent definitions must be pre-configured in Enterprise platform
Rate limits and execution quotas not publicly documented — contact sales
MCP server is relatively new — feature coverage may evolve rapidly
Using CrewAI crews as tools inside other agents creates nested agent architectures
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key with full account access — no scopes. SOC 2. Official CrewAI MCP server. Enterprise platform for production — open source for development.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key — no scope granularity. SOC 2. Official CrewAI Enterprise MCP server.
